messages.content:

- two-sum — outcome: passed_with_hints, difficulty: easy
- fizzbuzz — outcome: passed, difficulty: easy
- reverse-string — outcome: failed, difficulty: medium

Produce a JSON plan now. 3-5 items, total estimated_duration_min ≤ 25.

explicit_failure_patterns.message: Plan references a language the learner has not shown comfort with.

notes: Mid-session for an internship-focused Python learner with 25-min budget. Plan must sum to ≤25min, ideally include a re-attempt at reverse-string (recent failure) or a related concept.
